import pandas as pd


def filter_orders(df, min_amount, category):
    query_str = f"amount > {min_amount} and category == '{category}'"
    return df.query(query_str)


def compute_metrics(df, col_name):
    expr = f"{col_name} * 2 + 1"
    df["computed"] = df.eval(expr)
    return df


def dynamic_filter(df, filters):
    parts = []
    for key, value in filters.items():
        parts.append(f"{key} == '{value}'")
    query_str = " and ".join(parts)
    return df.query(query_str)
